A missing permissions check allowed users to request reading form submissions of other users.

### Patches

It is recommended that the Nextcloud Forms is upgraded to 5.2.6

### Workarounds

* Disable the Forms app
* No other workaround available

### References

<!-- Link to the main/master PR only -->

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3628817)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/forms/pull/3269)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
